catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for NWSHELF_ANALYSISFORECAST_PHY_004_013, detailing the ocean physics analysis and forecast product provided by MERCATOR OCEAN INTERNATIONAL under the EU Copernicus Marine Service.
